data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: YouTube utilizes a microservices architecture to manage different features independently.
data.technical_spec: Containerized services deployed on cloud infrastructure.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A global network of servers to deliver video content efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google's CDN for low latency and high-speed delivery.

data.title: Data Storage Solutions
data.description: Distributed storage systems for scalable and reliable data management.
data.technical_spec: Combination of Google Cloud Storage and BigTable.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures efficient distribution of incoming network traffic.
data.technical_spec: Implemented via advanced load balancing techniques.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized entry point for service interactions.
data.technical_spec: Manages communication between different services and clients.
